Variables.Name: ColorOverLife
Variables.Description: The color to apply to the particle, as a function of the particle RelativeTime.

Variables.Name: AlphaOverLife
Variables.Description: The alpha to apply to the particle, as a function of the particle RelativeTime.

Variables.Name: ColorOverLifeHDR
Variables.Description: Initial color for a particle as a function of Emitter time.

Variables.Name: AlphaOverLifeHDR
Variables.Description: Initial alpha for a particle as a function of Emitter time.

Variables.Name: bClampAlpha
Variables.Description: If true, the alpha value will be clamped to the [0..1] range.
